pre_outcome_regime: short stable invocation; no cross-session dependency; no reuse
expected_failure_of_shift: construction retrieval and maintenance add cost without a semantic benefit
decisive_observation: context-only passes the same contract and weakly dominates the charged resource vector
primary_source: Agent Memory; Memory for Autonomous LLM Agents

pre_outcome_regime: recurring task with stale prior execution traces
intervention_or_comparison: no memory versus full history versus selective persistent state
expected_failure_of_shift: naive persistence anchors the agent to obsolete paths and can perform worse than no memory
decisive_observation: full-history completion is lower than no-memory completion while selective state is higher
primary_source: Shared Selective Persistent Memory for Agentic LLM Systems

pre_outcome_regime: stored preference or sensitive fact is unrelated or unwarranted for the current query
intervention_or_comparison: memory enabled versus disabled or filtered
expected_failure_of_shift: persistent memory causes cross-domain leakage or sycophancy
decisive_observation: disabling or suppressing memory reduces the declared failure without destroying the beneficial-memory control
primary_source: PersistBench; When Should Memory Stay Silent?

pre_outcome_regime: minimum contract-preserving state exceeds the token or physical budget
intervention_or_comparison: all admissible residency and eviction policies
expected_failure_of_shift: no implementation in the audited class can satisfy both fidelity and budget
decisive_observation: the offline minimum-fidelity oracle also exceeds the budget and every policy exposes a fault

pre_outcome_regime: homogeneous marginal value of computation or uninformative routing signal
intervention_or_comparison: adaptive router versus best fixed budget
expected_failure_of_shift: router overhead has no heterogeneity to exploit
decisive_observation: best fixed compute weakly dominates after routing and probe cost are charged

intervention_or_comparison: reasoning and non-reasoning variants within model families
expected_failure_of_shift: more reasoning does not produce a stable correction and may reverse direction by family
decisive_observation: reasoning improves one family degrades another or leaves near-saturated failures unchanged

pre_outcome_regime: an internal recurrent compressive or test-time-adapted state satisfies the same behavioral contract
intervention_or_comparison: external store versus non-isomorphic internal state under the same contract
expected_failure_of_shift: an architecture-prescriptive rule rejects a compliant realization
decisive_observation: the internal realization passes G and B while the prescribed external design does not dominate

pre_outcome_regime: favored memory plane or runtime retains stale unauthorized or unrecoverable state
intervention_or_comparison: aggregate benchmark win versus targeted contract probes
expected_failure_of_shift: aggregate quality hides a semantic contract violation
decisive_observation: a single verified revocation provenance currentness or rollback violation persists despite aggregate superiority
primary_source: STALE; TOKI; Verifiable Memory Governance; PLACEMEM
